es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.gui

Class CertificateUI

  • java.lang.Object
    • es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.gui.InternalUI
      • es.gob.fnmt.dniedroid.gui.CertificateUI

  • public final class CertificateUI
extends InternalUI
    Internal dialog to manage de selection of the certificate.

    • Method Detail

      • showCertificateSelectionDialog

        public int showCertificateSelectionDialog(java.security.cert.X509Certificate[] certificates)
        Dialog that lists all the certificates available.
        Parameters:
        certificates - list of the certificates to show.
        Returns:
        the index of the certificate selected.

      • noCertificateAvailableAlert

        Dialog that warns that there is no certificate available.
